heading: Applicability to a case removed from a State court
label: 3150 Applicability to a case removed from a State court
text: The provisions of this chapter apply to a criminal case removed to a Federal court from a State court.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3150, added , , , related to penalties for failure to appear, prior to repeal in the revision of this chapter by .Pub. L. 89–465, § 3(a)80 Stat. 216section 203(a) of Pub. L. 98–473June 22, 1966
